text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If I can't even be bothered to really try, there's no
way I'm ever winning.
choice_data_list: I still believe you have what it takes to win.
I still believe you have what it takes to win.
Does that mean you're okay with losing?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If I can't even be bothered to really try, there's no
way I'm ever winning.
choice_data_list: I still believe you have what it takes to win.
I still believe you have what it takes to win.
Does that mean you're okay with losing?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Do you really think believing is all it takes?
You're always like this.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you shouldn't put so much faith in me next
race.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Just stop it. I hate you trying to say things to
console me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It was always going to go down like this today. I
was in no state to win.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That doesn't mean I'm okay with it. I can't stay
like this forever.
